emit.description: Whether the scout writes findings to the inbox. False runs the scout without emitting findings.

enabled.description: Whether this scout runs on its schedule. Disabled scouts are skipped by the coordinator.

id.description: A UUID string identifying this Signal scout config.

output_destinations.description: Destinations that receive each finding this scout emits. Pass an empty object to disable delivery.

channel.description: Slack channel target in the channel picker's `channel_id|#channel-name` format. Null while choosing a channel; no messages are sent until it is set.

integration_id.description: ID of the Slack integration whose bot posts this scout's findings.

slack.description: Slack destination for each emitted scout finding. Null or omitted disables Slack delivery.
